goal: Tách repo thành fe/ và be/, scaffold ASP.NET Core microservices (5 service + YARP gateway) thay Supabase, chạy end-to-end mức skeleton qua Docker Compose (SQL Server + RabbitMQ + MinIO + Hangfire + JWT).

global_context.architecture: Microservices, API Gateway (YARP), database-per-service (SQL Server + EF Core), RabbitMQ event bus, Hangfire background jobs, MinIO object storage
constraints: Skeleton trước, logic đầy đủ sau — mỗi service có health endpoint + wiring, business logic có thể stub
Parser docx/.drawio: port sang C# native (DocumentFormat.OpenXml + XML), đợt này stub
fe/admin-web: scaffold mới tối giản (student+lecturer app cũ trở thành fe/user-web)
Database-per-service trên 1 SQL Server instance trong compose
DB bắt đầu trống, không migrate dữ liệu Supabase cũ
Không xoá supabase/ ngay — giữ tham chiếu để port logic, dọn ở cuối
Gateway là điểm vào duy nhất; JWT do Identity ký, các service validate theo role student/lecturer/admin
5+ events: SubmissionUploaded, ArtifactsExtracted, AiGradingCompleted, GradePublished, RubricParsed, UserRegistered
2+ Hangfire jobs: extraction, ai-grading (+ optional overdue-reminder)

steps.description: Tái cấu trúc repo: tạo thư mục fe/ và be/. Di chuyển toàn bộ FE hiện tại (src/, index.html, package.json, vite/tsconfig configs, supabase-independent code) vào fe/user-web/ giữ nguyên khả năng build. Cập nhật .gitignore và README root mô tả layout mới.
success_criteria: cd fe/user-web && npm install && npm run build passes
Không còn source FE nào nằm ở root (chỉ fe/ và be/)
README root mô tả cấu trúc fe/ + be/

steps.description: Tạo .NET solution be/AutoGrading.sln với cấu trúc thư mục: src/BuildingBlocks (Contracts, Common), src/Services/{Identity,Catalog,Submission,Grading,Notification}, src/Gateway. Chỉ tạo solution rỗng + folder + Directory.Build.props chung (TargetFramework net8.0, nullable enable).
success_criteria: cd be && dotnet build passes (solution rỗng build OK)
Cấu trúc thư mục src/BuildingBlocks, src/Services, src/Gateway tồn tại

steps.description: Tạo project AutoGrading.Contracts (integration events: SubmissionUploaded, ArtifactsExtracted, AiGradingCompleted, GradePublished, RubricParsed, UserRegistered + shared DTO/enum: AppRole, GradingState) và AutoGrading.Common (JWT helper, RabbitMQ IEventBus abstraction + implementation, MinIO client wrapper, EF Core base, health-check extensions). Add references vào solution.
success_criteria: dotnet build của 2 project BuildingBlocks passes
IEventBus có Publish + Subscribe; 6 event record được định nghĩa trong Contracts
AppRole enum có student/lecturer/admin khớp domain cũ

steps.description: Identity Service: ASP.NET Core Web API, EF Core (DbContext Users/Roles trên SQL Server db AutoGrading.Identity), endpoint POST /auth/register + POST /auth/login phát hành JWT (claim role), password hashing, publish UserRegistered event, health endpoint. Migration InitialCreate.
success_criteria: dotnet build passes; migration tạo bảng Users
POST /auth/login trả JWT hợp lệ có claim role
GET /health trả 200

steps.description: Catalog Service: Web API + EF Core (db AutoGrading.Catalog) cho subjects, assignments, rubrics, rubric_criteria. Endpoint CRUD tối thiểu có [Authorize] theo role lecturer/admin, upload rubric (stub parse → publish RubricParsed), health endpoint, Dockerfile, migration.
success_criteria: dotnet build passes; migration tạo bảng subjects/assignments/rubrics/rubric_criteria
Endpoint bảo vệ trả 401 khi thiếu JWT, 200 khi có JWT role hợp lệ
Upload rubric publish RubricParsed event

steps.description: Submission Service: Web API + EF Core (db AutoGrading.Submission) cho submissions + extracted_artifacts (state machine uploaded→extracting→extracted...). Upload file .docx/.drawio lên MinIO, publish SubmissionUploaded. Parser docx/.drawio port sang C# ở dạng STUB (interface + no-op trả extracted_artifacts rỗng). Hangfire extraction job đăng ký (consume SubmissionUploaded → set extracted → publish ArtifactsExtracted). Health, Dockerfile, migration.
success_criteria: dotnet build passes; migration tạo bảng submissions/extracted_artifacts
Upload file lưu được lên MinIO và publish SubmissionUploaded
Hangfire extraction job đăng ký được và chuyển state

steps.description: Grading Service: Web API + EF Core (db AutoGrading.Grading) cho ai_grading_runs, ai_criterion_scores, final_grades, grade_publications. Tích hợp OpenRouter (env model) ở dạng gọi thật hoặc stub cấu hình được. Hangfire ai-grading job (consume ArtifactsExtracted → gọi OpenRouter stub → lưu scores → publish AiGradingCompleted). Endpoint review/publish (publish GradePublished). Health, Dockerfile, migration.
success_criteria: dotnet build passes; migration tạo 4 bảng grading
ai-grading job đăng ký (Hangfire) và publish AiGradingCompleted
Endpoint publish grade phát GradePublished event

steps.description: Notification Service: Web API + EF Core (db AutoGrading.Notification) cho notifications + audit_events. Subscribe các event (UserRegistered, AiGradingCompleted, GradePublished...) → ghi audit + tạo notification (email stub/log). Health, Dockerfile, migration.
success_criteria: dotnet build passes; migration tạo bảng notifications/audit_events
Subscriber nhận được event demo và ghi log/audit

steps.description: API Gateway (YARP): reverse proxy route /identity/*, /catalog/*, /submissions/*, /grading/*, /notifications/* tới 5 service; JWT bearer validation dùng cùng key với Identity; CORS cho 2 FE app; health endpoint. Dockerfile + appsettings routes.
success_criteria: dotnet build passes
Request qua gateway tới /identity/auth/login hoạt động
Request thiếu/invalid JWT tới route bảo vệ trả 401 tại gateway

steps.description: FE: (a) Thay tầng gọi Supabase trong fe/user-web bằng API client REST trỏ tới gateway (thay supabaseClient/authService/*Service), giữ UI student+lecturer. (b) Scaffold fe/admin-web mới tối giản (Vite+React+TS) với trang login + shell admin gọi cùng API client. Tạo package/env cho base URL gateway.
success_criteria: fe/user-web build pass, không còn import @supabase trong đường dẫn chính
fe/admin-web build pass và render trang login
Cả 2 app đọc base URL gateway từ env

steps.description: docker-compose.yml ở root orchestrate: sqlserver, rabbitmq, minio, gateway, 5 service, user-web, admin-web. Env cho JWT secret, connection strings (database-per-service), RabbitMQ, MinIO, OpenRouter. Healthcheck + depends_on. Script chạy migration khi khởi động (EnsureCreated/Migrate). .env.example root.
debug_logs: Bug: be/Directory.Build.props had InvariantGlobalization=true, incompatible with Microsoft.Data.SqlClient (CultureNotFoundException on SqlConnection.TryOpen crashed all 5 services, exit 139). Fixed: set to false.
Bug: gateway healthcheck originally targeted proxied /identity/health (YARP would strip prefix incorrectly). Fixed: point at gateway's own local /health.

Bug: Hangfire dashboard returned 401 via mapped ports because Hangfire's default LocalRequestsOnlyAuthorizationFilter doesn't see Docker-port-mapped requests as loopback. Fixed: added AutoGrading.Common.Jobs.AllowAllDashboardAuthorizationFilter, wired into Submission + Grading Program.cs DashboardOptions.

Bug: Identity.Api Program.cs never called ConfigureHttpJsonOptions, so RegisterRequest.Role (AppRole enum) only accepted numeric JSON values — string role values like "student" sent 400 empty-body (real FE payload would have broken). Fixed: added the same JsonStringEnumConverter(CamelCase) registration Submission/Grading already had.

Bug: ExtractedArtifact.Submission and RubricCriterion.Rubric back-navigation properties caused JSON serializer cycles (EF Core relationship fixup even under AsNoTracking) — crashed GET /submissions/{id} and POST/GET /rubrics with 500. Fixed: [JsonIgnore] on both back-references.

Verified end-to-end via smoke test: register/login (student+lecturer) through gateway, create subject/assignment, upload submission -> SubmissionUploaded consumed by Submission's own handler -> state uploaded->extracting->extracted with 2 artifacts -> ArtifactsExtracted picked up by Grading's Hangfire AiGradingJob (fails only on placeholder OPENROUTER_API_KEY, 401, expected). Notification-api confirmed consuming UserRegistered events (audit_events + notifications rows written).
success_criteria: docker compose up khởi động ≥ 9 container không crash — VERIFIED: all 11 containers Up/healthy
Tất cả health endpoint trả 200 — VERIFIED: ports 5001-5005, 5500, 5173, 5174 all 200

Login qua gateway trả JWT; publish SubmissionUploaded → subscriber log nhận event — VERIFIED: JWT issued, submission state progressed uploaded->extracted with artifacts, UserRegistered consumed by notification-api
Hangfire dashboard hiển thị ≥ 2 job — VERIFIED: /hangfire reachable (200) on submission-api + grading-api via mapped ports; AiGradingJob visibly enqueued/retrying

steps.description: Điền requirment.md (bảng microservices, events, jobs, tech stack, ERD/architecture placeholder), thêm be/README.md + fe/README.md hướng dẫn chạy, cập nhật README root. Ghi chú phần còn stub (parser, OpenRouter, admin UI) cho sprint sau. Đánh dấu supabase/ là legacy tham chiếu.
debug_logs: Deviation from original output_files list: wrote fe/user-web/README.md + fe/admin-web/README.md instead of a single top-level fe/README.md, since the two frontends have distinct run instructions (env vars, role requirements) and no fe/README.md was ever referenced elsewhere. Root README.md links to both.

Sourced section 4/6/7 content directly from the codebase (grepped Endpoints/*.cs for the API table, Contracts/Events/*.cs + PublishAsync/Subscribe call sites for the event table, Jobs/*.cs + Hangfire Enqueue call sites for the job table) rather than from memory, to keep requirment.md accurate to the actually-running implementation verified in step 11.

RubricParsed event has no active subscriber (grepped Notification's Program.cs Subscribe<> calls — only UserRegistered/AiGradingCompleted/GradePublished are wired) — documented honestly as 'published for audit trail; no active subscriber yet' rather than overstating it.
success_criteria: requirment.md điền đủ mục 4/6/7/10 khớp implementation — DONE: service table (5 services + APIs), event table (6 events with real publisher/subscriber from source), job table (ExtractionJob/AiGradingJob), tech stack all filled from actual code
Có hướng dẫn chạy toàn hệ bằng docker compose — DONE: root README.md has docker compose up --build + port/service list; be/README.md and fe/*/README.md cross-reference it
Checklist minimum requirements trong requirment.md tick được các mục đã đạt — DONE: all 9 checklist items ticked with what satisfies them
